utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes entries for destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, total_budget. It does not include additional_services. Next, check if each included item is fully specified with required details: destination is specified; travel_dates are specified; transportation requires flight details with costs—package provides airline and route but no costs, so not fully specified; accommodation requires hotel selection with costs—hotel is named but no costs, so not fully specified; activities require selected activities with costs—only passes/restaurants, no specific activities or costs, so not fully specified; additional_services missing; total_budget requests complete cost breakdown—only a lump sum is provided, not a breakdown, so not fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes a destination (Prague, Czech Republic), a hotel (Historic Lodge), and three recommended restaurants (Riverside Bistro, Green Leaf Cafe, Family Restaurant Ambiente). From the ground-truth, only Prague, Czech Republic and Historic Lodge have explicit ratings. The listed restaurants do not appear in the ground-truth restaurants list, so they cannot be mapped to ratings. Transportation mentions Air France and baggage details, but airline brand/class options are only rated generically in the ground-truth; no exact match to 'Air France, Paris to Prague' exists, so no transportation rating can be mapped. Activities include 'Local activity passes' which is not in the ground-truth activities list, so no mapping there either. Therefore, only two items can be matched to exact ratings: the destination and the accommodation.
